purpose: Durable P18 aiflow queue for post-P17 Gateway and Cache remaining candidate convergence, treating BenchmarkCacheHotPath as the latest allocation-blocking cache surface while keeping Gateway proxy and loader-hit rows report-only until separate evidence clears.

submissionCommands: go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P18-01-P17-COMPLETION-HANDOFF -title "P17 completion handoff" -description "Mark P17 as the latest completed governance batch and open P18 for Gateway and Cache remaining candidate convergence." -kind governance -priority 100

go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P18-02-GATEWAY-PROXY-ALLOCATION-HOLD-EVIDENCE -title "Gateway proxy allocation hold evidence" -description "Attach Gateway proxy post-P17 hold criteria, allocation reduction target, rollback boundary, and report-only release note guardrails." -kind governance -priority 99

go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P18-03-CACHE-LOADER-HIT-PROMOTION-PRECHECK -title "Cache loader hit promotion precheck" -description "Attach loader-hit cache promotion precheck, separate scope from Get hit, and keep it report-only until miss and invalidation evidence converge." -kind governance -priority 98
aiflowSubmission.runtimeStatePolicy: .aiflow, .harness, .tmp-test, .trae, coverage.out, bench/current.txt, bench/regression-report.json, bench/summary.md, bin/gofly, and docs/superpowers remain ignored local evidence and must not be committed.
aiflowSubmission.safetyPolicy: P18 tasks are submitted to ignored local aiflow runtime state and mirrored here as durable docs/reference evidence; each task must be completed in order and committed by the current agent or human only after its gate passes or an environment-limited downgrade is documented.

previousBatchHandoff.completionPolicy: P17 is treated as completed only when all three task rows in docs/reference/governance-p17-roadmap.json carry completion status, verification commands, and pending-current-commit placeholders owned by their per-task commits.
previousBatchHandoff.runtimeStatePolicy: Local .aiflow queue data is runtime evidence only; durable completion evidence belongs in docs/reference/governance-p17-roadmap.json and docs/reference/governance-boundary-inventory.json.

tasks.title: P17 completion handoff
tasks.objective: Convert P17 from active completed roadmap evidence into the latest completed governance batch and open P18 as the next active aiflow batch.
tasks.deliverable: P17 completed task evidence, P18 active roadmap, boundary inventory transition, dashboard convergence fields, and aiflow runtime-state exclusion proof.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after the P17 completion handoff and P18 active-batch evidence pass boundary inventory and governance report gates without staging ignored runtime state

tasks.title: Gateway proxy allocation hold evidence
tasks.objective: Keep BenchmarkGatewayProxy outside tracked allocation blocking while recording the concrete reduction target, rollback boundary, and release note guardrails required before promotion.
tasks.deliverable: Gateway proxy hold evidence, allocation target, rollback note, report-only release policy, and bench-regression-check guardrails.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after Gateway proxy hold evidence passes bench-regression-check and still forbids trackedBenchmarks promotion

tasks.title: Cache loader hit promotion precheck
tasks.objective: Keep BenchmarkCacheHotPathGetOrLoadHit separate from the promoted Get hit path and define promotion prerequisites for loader, miss, invalidation, and rollback behavior.
tasks.deliverable: Loader-hit cache promotion precheck, scope separation from BenchmarkCacheHotPath, miss/invalidation blockers, and report-only release note policy.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after loader-hit precheck passes bench-regression-check and keeps loader-hit outside trackedBenchmarks
